text: This chapter may be cited as the Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 730. Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act
##### § 730.001 — Short Title

This chapter may be cited as the Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1187, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: This chapter may be cited as the Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1187, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.
